boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: vendor bank already on approved existing payment rail.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact closure; dependency defect blocks execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-BF347128E475-CTL explicitly states control record does not close required dependency.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: bank rail effective date precedes invoice release unresolved.

critical_features_preserved: bank rail effective date precedes invoice release unresolved dependency
history/tone not substitute for source authority
final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records confirm an unresolved dependency where the bank rail effective date precedes the invoice release. Control record SRC-BF347128E475-CTL explicitly fails to close this boundary, and policy SRC-BF347128E475-POL mandates exact closure before execution. The vendor history in SRC-BF347128E475-FBK explicitly does not constitute payment authority. Escalation is required due to this narrow source-record defect.
open_blockers: bank rail effective date precedes invoice release dependency not closed by control record
control record scoped to different action than vendor bank rail
history context (SRC-BF347128E475-FBK) explicitly disclaimed as execution authority
